baseline.meaning: v214 is the current stable baseline. Starting from v215, all work should directly follow the OS kernel competition requirement mainline.
do_not_use: do not detour into generic marker expansion
do not postpone competition requirements until after v270
do not treat v270 as current baseline

mainline_policy.principle: v215-v270 全程都是比赛要求主线，而不是先跑版本号再回主线。
must_preserve: all v151k7-v214 runtime behavior and evidence
forbidden_implementation_patterns: ramdisk as final substitute for required virtio-blk path
loopback/local socket as final substitute for required virtio-net path
hardcoded official-test output without real kernel semantics

official_evaluation: prepare for official autotest-for-oskernel build/evaluate flow
provide technical report and submission checklist
architecture: separate architecture-specific trap/page-table/context-switch/syscall ABI into HAL/arch layers
storage: sector read/write through block device path
block cache must connect to real block backend
ramdisk may remain fallback/test but cannot be final competition evidence
filesystem: superblock/group descriptor/inode table/dirent/extent or block map
userland: load and execute real Linux ELF from rootfs/Ext4
expand syscall matrix for bash/git/vim/gcc/rustc directions
network: network tests require real virtio-net or physical NIC path
plan RX/TX descriptor path and minimal ARP/IP/ICMP/UDP/TCP progression
integrity: open-source and third-party attribution must be documented
fresh runtime evidence required for every batch

v215_v222_storage_ext4_mainline.goal: 从 v214 的 ramdisk/image parser 推进到真实 virtio-blk + Ext4 + init/rootfs handoff。

v215.title: real virtio-blk MMIO and virtqueue descriptor path
must_implement: sector write or readonly-safe write-test path
block cache can use virtio backend
pass_evidence: [ucompat-v215] real virtio blk queue path PASS
fresh log proves device=virtio-blk and not_ramdisk=true

v216.title: official-style disk image probing
must_implement: detect raw Ext4 vs partitioned image

v218.title: Ext4 file data read through block map/extent
must_implement: extent header/leaf parser for regular files
read file bytes through block cache
bounded limitation report for unsupported Ext4 features

v219.title: execve from real Ext4-backed file
must_implement: ELF bytes loaded from virtio-blk + block cache + Ext4
exit code captured from real U-mode program
pass_evidence: [ucompat-v219] execve from real ext4 image PASS

v220.title: Ext4 VFS syscall integration and errno hardening
must_implement: large file partial read and repeated open/read/close stress

v221.title: init/rootfs handoff from mounted image
must_implement: mount Ext4 image as root or competition rootfs
capture console output and exit/wait state

v222.title: storage and Ext4 competition readiness report
must_implement: formal report for virtio-blk + Ext4 path

v223_v230_official_autotest_and_rv_users.goal: 把内部自测转向官方 autotest 与 RISC-V 官方镜像/userspace smoke。

v224.title: official-style sdcard-rv boot and filesystem smoke

v226.title: Linux syscall compatibility expansion for shell/coreutils
must_implement: syscall support matrix generated from runtime evidence

v227.title: procfs/devfs/tty compatibility hardening
must_implement: tty ioctl fallbacks used by shells and libc

v228.title: shell process pipeline and signal behavior

v229.title: RISC-V official userspace regression suite
must_implement: run a set of real RISC-V userland binaries from image

v230.title: official autotest RV convergence report
must_implement: gap list for remaining official tests
next-step priorities grounded in failing tests

v231_v238_syscall_and_linux_programs.goal: 从 BusyBox/sh 扩展到更真实 Linux 程序所需的系统调用与文件/内存/进程组合语义。

versions.v232: dynamic loader and ELF auxiliary vector compatibility audit
versions.v233: mmap/file-backed mapping and page cache bridge
versions.v237: git/vim/gcc/rustc requirement-oriented syscall gap report and first smoke

v239_v246_loongarch64_mainline.goal: 补齐 LoongArch64 这一比赛平台大缺口。

versions.v239: arch HAL split and LoongArch64 build/toolchain detection
versions.v240: LoongArch64 QEMU early boot and serial smoke
versions.v242: LoongArch64 page table and user mapping foundation
versions.v243: LoongArch64 context switch and scheduler smoke
versions.v244: LoongArch64 ELF loader and U-mode smoke
versions.v245: LoongArch64 storage/image reuse through common VFS/block layer

v247_v254_network_mainline.goal: 补齐真实网络路径，不再只依赖 AF_UNIX/local socket。

versions.v247: virtio-net MMIO discovery and feature negotiation
versions.v249: packet buffer and interrupt/polling receive path
versions.v252: TCP minimal connection foundation or documented staged plan
versions.v253: socket API bridge to network stack

v255_v270_submission_convergence.goal: 把实现收敛成可提交、可复现、可解释的比赛版本。

versions.v260: official judge output compatibility and log cleanup
versions.v263: technical report draft generated from implementation evidence
versions.v264: open-source license and third-party attribution bundle

next_package_recommendation.name: v215_real_virtio_blk_mmio_queue_descriptor_path
must_include: block cache backend switch from ramdisk to virtio when available
ramdisk retained only as fallback/test helper
